title: Garlicky Flaky Canadian Dried Shrimp Bake
description: A quick onepot baked dish that layers umamirich dried shrimp with garlicinfused butter and a crisp almondflour topping for a flaky finish.
instructions: In a bowl, combine melted butter, olive oil, minced garlic, thyme, salt, pepper, lemon zest, almond flour, Parmesan, and maple extract until a loose crumbly batter forms.
Place the dried shrimp in a baking dish, making sure they lay flat to maximize surface contact.
Evenly spoon the crumb mixture over the shrimp, pressing lightly to cover all pieces.
Bake for 15 minutes, until the topping is golden brown and the shrimp are heated through.
Remove from oven and let rest 2 minutes; sprinkle chopped parsley over the top.
Serve immediately, pairing with a crisp green salad or steamed veggies.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
Reheat in a preheated oven at 180 °C for 5 minutes if desired.
Enjoy the savory, flaky texture with a gentle Canadian maple note.
